body.text: Drag-and-drop the documents below into this chat (or use the paperclip icon). I'll confirm each one as it arrives.

facts.title: 1. Journal Report
facts.value: Full GL / detail report for the period

facts.title: 2. Balance Sheet
facts.value: As of period-end, with prior-period comparative

facts.title: 3. Profit & Loss
facts.value: For the period, with prior-period comparative

facts.title: 4. Bank Statements
facts.value: All bank + credit card accounts, full period

facts.title: 5. Prior-Year BS
facts.value: Closing balance sheet for the prior year — any format (QBO export, prior accountant's summary PDF, scan). Name the file with 'Prior Year' or 'Opening' so I can identify it.

body.text: Why the prior-year BS matters: it lets me complete the three-way reconciliation (opening liability + current-year accrual − payments = closing liability) on sales tax, payroll DAS, and corporate tax. Without it, I can only report a current-state snapshot — I can't confirm whether prior-year liabilities were cleared cleanly or if prior-year noise is polluting the current-year P&L.
Accepted formats: PDF, XLSX, CSV. Mark scanned (image-only) statements when you upload — OCR is slower and less accurate.
